items.title: Bringing more control over your connectors
Introducing Mistral OCR 4
items.description: Mistral OCR 4 delivers enterprise document AI with 170-language support, bounding boxes, and self-hosted deployment.

items.title: AI Now Summit 2026
items.description: Innovations for global enterprises solving the world’s hardest problems.

items.title: Vibe gets to work.
items.description: The unified agent for long-horizon productivity and coding, launching with Work and Code modes. Plus, a new Vibe VS Code extension.

items.title: Introducing Search Toolkit
items.description: Search Toolkit is a composable framework for building production search pipelines for AI applications.

items.title: Introducing physics AI at Mistral: the foundation for engineering acceleration.
items.description: A new class of AI models that predict the behavior of physical systems, powering the engineers and hardware products of tomorrow.

items.title: Physics AI research that’s shaping the industry.
items.description: Published breakthroughs pushing the state of the art.

items.title: Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry
Remote agents in Vibe. Powered by Mistral Medium 3.5.
items.description: Introducing Mistral Medium 3.5, remote coding agents in Vibe, plus new Work mode in Le Chat for complex tasks.

items.title: Connect the dots: Build with built-in and custom MCPs in Studio
items.description: Connect enterprise data to your AI applications with reusable connectors, direct tool calling, and human-in-the-loop approval controls.

items.title: Workflows for work that runs the business
items.description: Workflows is now in public preview.

items.title: Speaking of Voxtral
items.description: Voxtral TTS: A frontier, open-weights text-to-speech model that’s fast, instantly adaptable, and produces lifelike speech for voice agents.
